assertions.title: Cancel job transitions to cancelled state

steps.action: Upload test_30s.wav via docker exec curl
steps.expected: Memo and job created with status queued
steps.observed: Memo created (id=61d766f4), Job created (id=0fc60e8c) with status queued

steps.action: Poll job status until transcribing state
steps.observed: Job reached transcribing state on first poll iteration

steps.action: POST /api/jobs/{id}/cancel during transcribing
steps.observed: Returned 200 with {status: cancelled, message: Job cancelled}

steps.action: GET /api/jobs/{id} after cancel
steps.observed: Status: cancelled, stage: cancelled, progress: 0.1 (frozen)

steps.action: Monitor SSE stream for job.cancelled event
steps.observed: SSE delivered: event: job.cancelled, data: {status: cancelled}

evidence.network: POST /api/jobs/0fc60e8c/cancel -> 200; GET /api/jobs/0fc60e8c -> {status: cancelled}; SSE: event job.cancelled received

steps.action: POST /api/jobs/{completed_job_id}/cancel on completed job
steps.observed: Returned 409: Cannot cancel job in 'completed' state

steps.action: POST /api/jobs/{failed_job_id}/cancel on failed job
steps.observed: Returned 409: Cannot cancel job in 'failed' state

steps.action: POST /api/jobs/{cancelled_job_id}/cancel on cancelled job
steps.observed: Returned 409: Cannot cancel job in 'cancelled' state

steps.action: Verify job statuses unchanged after 409 attempts
steps.observed: completed->completed, failed->failed, cancelled->cancelled

assertions.title: Failed job stores error code and message

steps.action: Upload corrupt_random.wav via docker exec curl
steps.observed: Memo (id=2c7863c1) and Job (id=253011f2) created with status queued

steps.action: Wait for job to process and fail
steps.observed: Job reached status: failed after ~10 seconds

steps.action: GET /api/jobs/{id} and check error fields
steps.expected: status: failed, non-null error_code, non-null error_message
steps.observed: status: failed, error_code: NORMALIZATION_FAILED, error_message: non-null descriptive message about ffmpeg failure

evidence.network: POST /api/memos -> 200; GET /api/jobs/253011f2 -> {status: failed, error_code: NORMALIZATION_FAILED, error_message: 'Audio normalization failed: ...Invalid data found when processing input'}

assertions.title: Retry creates new job with incremented attempt count

steps.action: POST /api/memos/{failed_memo_id}/retry after first failure
steps.expected: 200 with new job, status queued, attempt_count=2
steps.observed: Returned 200 with new job (id=172e600d), status: queued, attempt_count: 2

steps.action: Wait for retry job to fail (still corrupt audio)
steps.observed: Job reached status: failed, attempt_count: 2

steps.action: POST /api/memos/{failed_memo_id}/retry again
steps.observed: Returned new job with status: queued, attempt_count: 3

steps.action: Verify new job starts from queued and transitions through pipeline
steps.observed: Second retry job started as queued, then failed (corrupt audio still)

steps.action: Upload test_30s.wav via docker exec curl
steps.observed: Memo (id=ea772c8b) and Job (id=299500c4) created with status queued

steps.action: Immediately POST /api/memos/{id}/retry while job is active (queued)
steps.expected: Returns 409 with error about active job
steps.observed: Returned 409: Cannot retry: memo has active job in 'queued' state

steps.action: Wait and verify original job completes normally
steps.observed: Original job completed successfully, no duplicate job created

steps.action: Upload corrupt_random.wav, observe initial job attempt_count=1
steps.observed: Initial job (id=253011f2) has attempt_count=1

steps.action: First retry after failure
steps.observed: Retry job (id=172e600d) has attempt_count=2

steps.action: Second retry after second failure
steps.observed: Second retry job has attempt_count=3

evidence.network: GET /api/jobs/253011f2 -> attempt_count: 1; POST retry -> attempt_count: 2; POST retry -> attempt_count: 3

steps.action: Upload test_30s.wav and immediately cancel (catching preprocessing/queued)
steps.observed: Cancel returned 200, job status: cancelled, stage: cancelled

steps.action: Check memo directory for partial files
steps.observed: Only source.original exists in memo directory, no normalized.wav

steps.action: POST /api/memos/{id}/retry on cancelled memo
steps.expected: Retry succeeds, creates new job from queued
steps.observed: Retry returned 200 with new job (id=a5306e1e), status: queued, attempt_count: 2

evidence.network: POST cancel -> 200; docker exec ls -> only source.original; POST retry -> 200 {status: queued, attempt_count: 2}

assertions.title: Cancel during transcription stops GPU processing

steps.action: Upload test_30s.wav (job1) and test_5s.wav (job2) simultaneously
steps.expected: Two jobs created, job2 queued behind job1
steps.observed: Job1 (id=8f90f2d2) and Job2 (id=fb7dd656) created

steps.action: Wait for job1 to reach transcribing, then cancel
steps.observed: Job1 caught in transcribing state and cancelled successfully

steps.action: Wait and check job2 begins processing after job1 cancelled
steps.observed: Job2 completed successfully after job1 cancellation

steps.action: Verify final states
steps.observed: Job1 final status: cancelled, Job2 final status: completed

steps.action: Note memo title and source_filename before retry
steps.observed: title=group-c-cancel-preprocess, source_filename=test_30s.wav

steps.action: Retry memo (from VAL-JOB-007 cancelled memo), wait for completion
steps.observed: Retry job (id=a5306e1e) completed with status: completed, progress: 1.0

steps.action: Check memo title and source_filename after retry
steps.observed: title=group-c-cancel-preprocess (unchanged), source_filename=test_30s.wav (unchanged)

steps.action: Verify source audio file still exists
steps.expected: source.original file present and same size
steps.observed: source.original exists (960078 bytes) at /app/data/memos/25dd3e16/source.original

steps.action: Also verify corrupt_random.wav memo data preserved across multiple retries
steps.observed: source.original exists (1024 bytes) at /app/data/memos/2c7863c1/source.original

evidence.network: POST retry -> 200; DB query shows title and source_filename unchanged; docker exec ls confirms source.original exists

frictions.description: 30-second WAV file transcribes in under 1 second on GPU, making it very difficult to catch the transcribing state for cancellation. Had to use tight polling loops (0.1-0.5s intervals) from inside the container to minimize network latency.
frictions.resolution: Used docker exec with bash loops polling at 0.1-0.5s intervals; successfully caught transcribing state on multiple attempts

frictions.description: Uploading test fixture files requires using docker exec curl since the files are inside the container. Uploading from host with @/dev/null workaround sends empty files.
frictions.resolution: Used docker exec funasr curl with @/app/data/test-fixtures/ paths for all fixture uploads

summary: Tested 9 assertions: all 9 passed. Cancel during transcription works correctly (status transitions to cancelled, SSE delivers job.cancelled event, GPU freed for next job). Retry on failed/cancelled memos creates new jobs with properly incremented attempt_count. Terminal state guards work (409 for cancel on completed/failed/cancelled, 409 for retry on active). Memo metadata and source files preserved through retry cycles.
